_meta.description: Structured image prompt format for Nano Banana 2 / Gemini Flash Image via Antigravity.
_meta.usage: Fill in the fields below and pass to Antigravity chat or your image generation workflow.

subject.details: Specific attributes, clothing, expression, pose, material, etc.

angle.type: eye-level | low-angle | high-angle | birds-eye | worms-eye | dutch-angle | over-the-shoulder | close-up | extreme-close-up | wide-shot | medium-shot
angle.description: Camera perspective and spatial relationship to the subject

focus.type: tack-sharp | shallow-dof | deep-dof | soft | selective | rack-focus
focus.focal_point: The primary element that should be sharpest

elements: specific objects, props, or features in the background
background.atmosphere: Clear, overcast, foggy, hazy, rainy, smoky, etc.

lighting.type: natural | studio | dramatic | cinematic | neon | golden-hour | blue-hour | backlit | rim-light | flat | high-key | low-key
lighting.direction: front | side | back | top | bottom | ambient | three-point

style.medium: photograph | digital-art | 3d-render | illustration | oil-painting | watercolor | pencil-sketch | vector | cinematic-still
style.aesthetic: photorealistic | hyperrealistic | cinematic | editorial | minimalist | vibrant | moody | corporate | retro | futuristic | raw
style.color_palette: Dominant color mood or hex palette description

composition.rule: rule-of-thirds | centered | symmetrical | leading-lines | frame-within-frame | golden-ratio | diagonal | negative-space
composition.camera_lens: wide-angle | standard-50mm | portrait-85mm | telephoto | macro | fisheye

text_overlay.position: top-left | top-center | top-right | center | bottom-left | bottom-center | bottom-right

mood: Overall emotional tone or feeling the image should evoke
negative_prompt: Elements, styles, or qualities to explicitly exclude from the image
